content: The largest, most proven, and the only true international real estate developer in Bahria Town and DHA Islamabad OUR VISION OUR MISSION To be the premier domestic and international partner for all your real estate needs by providing the highest value-addition in your interaction with the real estate industry globally. To maximize value-creation for every stakeholder involved in the Real Estate development chain - from pre-development investors to rentals tenants.

OUR FIRM HAS EXTENSIVE OPERATIONS IN : OUR SERVICES The firm specializes in Real Estate Development, Domestic and International Brokerage, Property Management, and Investment Advisory EXPERTS FOR EVERY STEP OF THE VALUE CHAIN LOCATIONS VERTICALLY INTEGRATED INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT DESIGN, PROJECT & DEVELOPMENT MANAGEMENT RENTAL & LEASING PROPERTY & FACILITIES MANAGEMENT KEY FACTS SQUARE FEET OF DEVELOPMENT IN DUBAI, ISLAMABAD, CANADA & NEW YORK 5 Million+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE DEVELOPMENT PROJECTS COMPLETED PROJECTS DUBAI ISLAMABAD CANADA NEW YORK PREMIER CHOICE INTERNATIONAL IS KNOWN FOR: EXTENSIVE INTERNATIONAL EXPERIENCE QUALITY CONTROL TIMELY PROJECT DELIVERY With the creation and subsequent growth of Premier Choice International, the company has established a strong foundation of an internationally experienced corporate team that conducts its operations with maximum efficiency and quality 13+ 25+ 12+

Nestled in the heart of Bahria Intellectual Village, the River Front Community is set to establish an unmatched standard of living. Comprising three residential towers, the gated community offers the ultimate fusion of exclusivity, privacy, and hospitality. The community is set to provide the finest amenities for every family. World-renowned hotel operator Wyndham’s Ramada in River Courtyard Tower 1 is set to take the community to unprecedented heights. . FEATURING RAMADA with

: BURAQ HEIGHTS Buraq Heights stands as a pinnacle of luxury, offering resort-style residential serviced apartments that promise an extraordinary living experience. These sophisticated apartments are meticulously designed to provide unparalleled comfort and elegance, featuring modern fixtures and finishes that cater to the most discerning tastes. Managed by Premier Hospitality, a visionary venture led by our CEO, Buraq Heights focuses on delivering a comprehensive range of amenities and services tailored to enhance your lifestyle in every possible way. Our offerings include a state-of-the-art fitness center, rejuvenating swimming pools, indulgent spa services, and a variety of recreational facilities, ensuring that every aspect of your living experience is catered to with the utmost care and attention. Premier Hospitality’s dedicated team is committed to upholding and exceeding international standards of service, a benchmark that sets us apart within Pakistan’s real estate development sector. From personalized concierge services to meticulous housekeeping, our goal is to meet your every need with precision and dedication. Shared amenities with: RESORT STYLE LUXURY LIVING

2 Basements + Commercial + 11 Floors Residential Apartments + Penthouse Bahria Intellectual Village, Phase 7, Islamabad. WE GIVE YOU PAKISTAN’S FIRST URBAN RESORT STYLE LIVING ON-DEMAND SERVICED LIVING RIVER FACING LUXURY LIVING EXECUTIVE THERMAL CLUB 200,000 SQ.FT. RESIDENTIAL + COMMERCIAL

Ground Floor Commercial Floor Plan Cafe & Restraunt Commercial Shops Buraq Heights offers flexible commercial spaces thoughtfully designed to boost community engagement. These spaces are tailored to accommodate diverse business needs, fostering a vibrant environment where commercial activity thrives, ultimately enhancing the overall community experience.

KEY LOCATION Buraq Heights is located in the Premier River Front, facing the riverside next to our flagship project, River Courtyard with Ramada. River Front is a 100,000+ SQ FT riverside facing recreation area. The community is distinguished by offering residents convenient and effortless access to top-tier schools, shopping malls, dining facilities, notable landmarks of Bahria Town Islamabad, and healthcare facilities. In addition to these desirable attributes, the development’s favoritism contributes to the area’s strong appeal among investors, who are enticed by the promising potential for high rental yields and a diverse range of opportunities. 2 mins Drive from Clock Tower 1 min drive from TMUC 7 mins drive from DHA Phase I Islamabad 10 mins drive from Bahria town Phase 8 15 mins drive form GT Road 25 mins from Islamabad Expressway
